title: rubus idaeus var. melanolasius
intro: Rubus idaeus var. melanolasius, also known as black raspberry, is a variety of the red raspberry plant with dark purple to black fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus idaeus var. melanolasius include its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus idaeus var. melanolasius include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Rubus idaeus var. melanolasius can be prepared as a tea, jam, or supplement, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
